title.en: The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch said in a deep...

content.en:
Ye Tian's strength has reached the 791st place on the Heavenly Monarch List, such strength is already very strong, coupled with Ye Tian's incredible life-saving ability, if he is not a true monarch, he doesn't want to kill Ye Tian at all.

Now.

There was a gloomy cloud in the Heavenly Fire Sect, especially the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch, who were even more panicked.

"What should I do, the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao is stronger than ours, his speed is much faster than ours, plus his ability to save his life is very strong, if it is against the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son, we will probably die!" Lieyang Heavenly Monarch was very worried.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi shouldn't dare to kill our Heavenly Fire Sect, right?" said the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch in a low voice.

"Don't dare? He didn't even enter the Heavenly Monarch List last time, he dared to kill him and assassinate so many of our Heavenly Monarchs, do you think he would not dare to kill us?"

"Do you want to send a Heavenly Monarch from above who is comparable to the top of the Heavenly Monarch List to enter the Great Universe?" asked the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch.

"Impossible!" Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch shook his head, "The price paid for sending Heavenly Monarch in now is too great, our Heavenly Fire Sect is not as good as the Dark Temple, and we will not be willing to pay such a price." Moreover, last time, due to the matter of the Dark Temple, the major forces had already strictly guarded this great universe, and it was not allowed to send the Heavenly Monarch in privately. "

"Then what should I do, I don't want to die, I am the Heavenly Monarch of the Heavenly Monarch, and in the midst of chaos it is enough to inform a Chaos Continent, how high my status is, and I am even expected to achieve a true ancestor in the future!" said the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch in a panic.

"Leave a clone here, let's hide and cultivate first!"

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch said in a deep voice.

"That's all there is to it!" the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch nodded in agreement.

Immediately, the two of them each separated into a clone and stayed in the Heavenly Fire Sect.

This doppelganger is only a temporary clone, which needs to be maintained by the Chaos Divine Power, and there is no way to improve the strength, and the strength is also very weak, just the strength of a four- or five-star god general, and it doesn't work at all.

They left their clones just to confuse the rest of the Heavenly Fire Sect, otherwise both of them would have run away, wouldn't the other Heavenly Monarchs be even more panicked?

......

The Great Universe was too big, and the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch were not together, but scattered, each looking for a place, and no one knew where they were.

Even the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch did not reveal their positions to each other, and they were afraid of revealing each other's locations.

The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch chose an uninhabited planet, hid in it, opened up a small world inside the planet, and began to cultivate and comprehend.

As long as there are resources, there is no delay in cultivating here, but it is just not as fast as the cultivation of the Heavenly Fire Sect.

Time passed year after year.

One day ten years later, Ye Tian came to the vicinity of this planet.

"The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch should be hiding on this uninhabited planet, hehe, do you think you will be safe if you leave the Heavenly Fire Sect?

Swish!

One of the Chaos Divine Powers, the Insight Heavenly Eye, opened, and Ye Tian instantly pierced through the void and saw the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch located in the center of the small world.

The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch is also the Heavenly Monarch, how powerful the perception is, he immediately knew that he had been discovered, and noticed Ye Tian's existence.

"Ten Thousand Laws, how can it be !!!"

The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch was extremely shocked.

He'd never told anyone he'd be here, and even the Sun Heavenly Monarch didn't know where he was.

And at this time, no deduction technique could deduce the whereabouts of other people, and he believed that no matter how proficient Ye Tian was in deduction supernatural powers, he would not be able to deduce his location.

"How did I get exposed?"

The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch was very confused, but now was not the time to be confused, he had to escape, otherwise he would not be able to survive at all.

"Prison of Ice and Fire!"

Ye Tian Void pointed at it, and an ice and fire prison covering the entire planet enveloped the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch, and this ice and fire prison could shake the void and block this area, so that the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch had no way to escape.

Bang!!!

In an instant, the planet turned to ashes, leaving only the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch alone.

The Ice and Fire Prison is just an ordinary chaotic supernatural power, and Ye Tian didn't focus on cultivating it, it was only an entry level, and he couldn't really trap the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch, but he could stop the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch.

Wow!

The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch turned into a white giant eagle, a terrifying giant eagle that was far countless times larger than the planet soared into the void, and a pair of wings shook slightly, instantly shattering Ye Tian's ice and fire prison.

At this time, Ye Tian's real attack came.

"Gold-devouring supernatural powers, turning knives!"

"Heavenly Sword Seventh Style-Void Sky Slash!"

"Extreme Knife Magical Power!"

The gold-devouring divine power turned into a long knife, and slashed through the void with one sword, and the seventh type of Heavenly Sword Void Sky Slash, which contained the blessing of the Extreme Sword Divine Power, fell down, blocking all directions around the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch.

The Seventh Style of the Heavenly Sword Void Sky Slash is a move that Ye Tian has recently created, making full use of the characteristics of the Void Heaven Dao Body and his understanding of the Dao of the Sword, and it can also be combined with the Extreme Sword Divine Power to exert terrifying power.

The power of this blow was far beyond the imagination of the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch!

Tear and pull!

The giant eagle that the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch had turned into was torn out a huge opening, almost cutting off his entire body.

In addition, the terrifying sword qi continued to erode the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch's body, making it difficult for him to recover from his injuries.

"Wanfa Daozi, don't kill us, there is no big enmity between us at all, I am willing to pay the price to buy my life!"

"No way, from the day you assassinated me, you were my enemy!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Puff puff puff!!

One after another sword qi kept slashing out, hitting the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch again and again.

The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch wanted to escape, but Ye Tian knew how to move time and space, and cultivated to the realm of Xiaocheng, this is a powerful divine power ranked 21st in the Chaos Divine Power, and in terms of speed, the other Chaos Divine Powers are younger brothers.

Unless the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch will move the Great Realm, there will be no hope of escaping.

Realm Shift is not very helpful in combat, but when it comes to escaping, Space-Time Shift is not as good as Realm Shift.

After all, the space-time transfer technique is more to help fight and hunt down the enemy, while the Great Realm Movement is the chaotic magic power of rushing and escaping.

"Wanfa Daozi, I am a descendant of the Chaos Tianpeng lineage, our Chaos Tianpeng lineage has a large number of true ancestors, and there is even an invincible true ancestor, do you really want to kill me?"

The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch roared.

His words were undoubtedly deliberately bluffing, the Chaos Tianpeng clan was very strong, but the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch only had a weak bloodline, and it had nothing to do with the Chaos Tianpeng clan at all, and it was impossible for the Chaos Tianpeng clan to offend a Dao ancestor for him.

He saw that Ye Tian was a native creature of the Great Universe, and his knowledge was not high, and he wanted to threaten Ye Tian, if Ye Tian really let him go, even if he knew the truth in the future, he would not be able to find him.

But he didn't care about his identity at all, even if the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch was the son of the Dao Ancestor, he would kill him.

As a personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and he is also a very valued personal disciple, is he afraid of the threat of others?

"Die!"

The last sword pierced through the body of the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch, completely shattering the last trace of his vitality.

Ancestral monument.

On the Heavenly Monarch List, the name belonging to the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch disappeared.

At this moment, many big forces knew that the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch had fallen.
